title: My First Post in Neo-Brutalism
description: Testing out Velite, MDX, and this crazy heavy-border design system.
content:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:r}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(t){const l={blockquote:"blockquote",code:"code",figure:"figure",li:"li",p:"p",pre:"pre",span:"span",ul:"ul",...t.components};return r(e,{children:[n(l.p,{children:"Welcome to the matrix."}),"
",n(l.p,{children:"This is a standard paragraph but it renders with our custom mono font. If I want to drop some knowledge, I can use a blockquote:"}),"
",r(l.blockquote,{children:["
",n(l.p,{children:'"Stay curious. Most interesting things happen outside the syllabus."'}),"
"]}),"
",n(l.p,{children:"Here is a list of things I need to finish:"}),"
",r(l.ul,{children:["
",n(l.li,{children:"Setup Velite"}),"
",n(l.li,{children:"Write MDX"}),"
",n(l.li,{children:"Deploy to Vercel"}),"
"]}),"
",r(l.p,{children:["And here is some inline code like ",n(l.code,{children:"npm run dev"}),", or a full code block:"]}),"
",n(l.figure,{"data-rehype-pretty-code-figure":"",children:n(l.pre,{style:{backgroundColor:"#24292e",color:"#e1e4e8"},tabIndex:"0","data-language":"javascript","data-theme":"github-dark",children:n(l.code,{"data-language":"javascript","data-theme":"github-dark",style:{display:"grid"},children:r(l.span,{"data-line":"",children:[n(l.span,{style:{color:"#E1E4E8"},children:"console."}),n(l.span,{style:{color:"#B392F0"},children:"log"}),n(l.span,{style:{color:"#E1E4E8"},children:"("}),n(l.span,{style:{color:"#9ECBFF"},children:'"Hello Priyadharshan!"'}),n(l.span,{style:{color:"#E1E4E8"},children:");"})]})})})})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:r}=e.components||{};return r?n(r,{...e,children:n(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};
